name.fr: Instruction de point de report à un avion léger
name.it: Istruzione di waypoint a velivolo leggero

metadata.description: Beispiel 2: Waypoint crossing clearance with a conditional report to a light aircraft. Demo fixture backing the mock-scenario voice loop (backend catalog id EX-02).
metadata.phraseologyStandard: ICAO Annex 10 Vol II / ICAO Doc 9432 (Manual of Radiotelephony)

disclosure.notice: Virtual-pilot voices are machine-generated (standard neural voices). Aircraft data is derived from a public live-flight feed. This scenario contains no personal data and MUST NOT be connected to live/operational ATC (CON-01, CON-03).

script.expectedAtcTransmission: N123AB, crossing to Schrattenfluh approved, descend 5'000 feet, QNH 1019, report crossing completed.
script.expectedReadBack: Crossing to Schrattenfluh approved and descending to 5,000 feet, QNH 1019, call you completed N123AB.
